title: Acinodendron macrothyrsum
taxonomy: Acinodendron macrothyrsum is classified within the family Melastomataceae. This classification places it within the order Myrtales. Further, it is placed in the family Melastomataceae under the tribe Melastomeae. More specifically, it is known to be closely related to other species within the Melastomataceae family, which are commonly found in tropical regions.
